ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., Stock, Commodity, Index) */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange on which the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the asset belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the asset belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) for the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the asset */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest in the asset */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the asset */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the asset */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the asset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the price data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data provider */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint provided by the data provider */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the data provider */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is updated by the data provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider supplying the data */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the data source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data provided by the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is updated by the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data ingestion log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which data was ingested */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was ingested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ingestion (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the ingestion event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preferences belong to */,
  "preferred_assets" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred assets */,
  "alert_thresholds" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of alert thresholds (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Configuration for the user's dashboard layout */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the user */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Preferred time zone of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preferences were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preferences were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message sent to the user when the alert is triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for generating the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality log */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the log is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data quality check */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., missing data, outlier) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "issue_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
